title: Liliths soul returning to Rei
wikitext:
[]: Lilith's soul returning to Rei             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Tue Jan 19, 2010 7:20 am Ok. Forgive me if I'm mistaken, but Rei has lilith's soul in her, right? So they must have been able to somehow transplant it from Lilith to Rei. But it's stated by Dr. Akagi somewhere (I don't know for certain) that they can't COPY a soul. So, after Rei dies, (twice) how exactly does the soul of Lilith return to the next Rei? Does it just go back to Lilith as if it were on some kind of elastic teather, and then they can transplant it again? It seems to be a bit of a "plot hole" to me, but I might be wrong. I know I have been, especially when Evangelion is involved.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 19, 2010 7:36 am It seems that souls lurk around in dead bodies for some time after death, unless the body is blown to bits (in which case the soul wanders off). Rei 2 got her soul from Rei 1, or at least some of it. Rei 3 got her soul transplanted from the roasted remains of Rei 2 in the Entry Plug. Here are a few of the Wiki articles on souls, although they're mostly in an appalling mess... http://wiki.evageeks.org/Soul http://wiki.evageeks.org/Nature_of_Souls http://wiki.evageeks.org/Eva-00%27s_soul

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jan 19, 2010 12:40 pm think ghostbusters

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jan 19, 2010 1:02 pm Souls stay with their dead bodies in the Evaverse, so they just take it out of the dead Rei and stick it in a new one.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:10 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Souls stay with their dead bodies in the Evaverse, so they just take it out of the dead Rei and stick it in a new one.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:15 pm Allemann wrote: When bodies disintegrate into molecules, where do those souls go? And if it works with Rei, can it work with normal humans?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:20 pm Mr. Tines wrote: No data. How do you think they installed the soul into EVA-03?

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:22 pm UrsusArctos wrote: unless the body is blown to bits

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:48 pm Mad wrote: Wasn't Rei II blown to bits?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:49 pm Mad wrote: Wasn't Rei II blown to bits? She self destructed her Eva, I doubt that just toasted her a little...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Jan 19, 2010 4:51 pm Allemann wrote: Rei body with Kaji's personality

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 19, 2010 5:00 pm Azathoth: - Clones don't have to be physically born. - The Rei clones are ... well ... clones. They exemplify "clone" better than anything else in the show. - They were not necessarily created as a result of the attempt to salvage Yui. The salvage attempt could have produced only Rei 1, with the clones produced in a separate event afterward. - We are told that the Rei clones do not have souls, hence they have no ATFs. -- This probably poses no problem at all, since it's highly doubtful that their bodies are composed of LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Tue Jan 19, 2010 5:09 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Mad wrote: Wasn't Rei II blown to bits?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jan 19, 2010 5:42 pm Now I want an Eva with Kaji's personality. Do it Anno

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Wed Jan 20, 2010 1:13 pm Reichu wrote: They were not necessarily created as a result of the attempt to salvage Yui. The salvage attempt could have produced only Rei 1, with the clones produced in a separate event afterward.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jan 20, 2010 1:55 pm Because she wasn't involved. Fuyutsuki most likely is the one who got the Rei project working, considering his academic specialty in metaphysical biology (aka, messing about with souls). Naoko seems to be very much focused on the magi, not nearly as broadly talented as Ritsuko.

[]: Re: Lilith's soul returning to Rei             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Jan 20, 2010 2:17 pm LordCaldwell wrote: So, after Rei dies, (twice) how exactly does the soul of Lilith return to the next Rei? Does it just go back to Lilith as if it were on some kind of elastic teather, and then they can transplant it again? It seems to be a bit of a "plot hole" to me, but I might be wrong.

[]: Re: Lilith's soul returning to Rei             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 20, 2010 2:57 pm Ironfoot wrote: It is a plot hole. The best one can assume is one of the following: 1) That the soul of Rei remains in her body after death and is manually reinserted into the next Rei. 2) Lilith's soul returns to her original body, from which it was harvested again into the next Rei. Unfortunately, there is no concrete evidence for either (as far as the interchange of Lilith's soul within Rei).

[]: Re: Lilith's soul returning to Rei             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:18 pm Reichu wrote: As is often mentioned, Rei visiting corpses to melt them down in EoE indicates that the soul is retained in the body after death. We have no reason in particular to think that Rei would be different in this regard. This probably constitutes concrete evidence; it is certainly not a lack of evidence.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:46 pm Just to clarify, didn't the Armisael battle more or less go down like this? 1) Rei 2 explodes with Eva-00. 2) Just before the explosion, Rei 2 and Rei 1 become one soul again (why Rei 3 is well, Rei 3. Also, there is something of visual evidence with Eva-00 becoming a GNR, but who knows just what the script says). 3) Rei 2 has been reduced to Kentucky Fried Rei while Eva-00 is pretty much destroyed. Given this sequence of events, I'd say Lilith's soul just stayed within the entry plug instead of flying off anywhere, including back to Lilith's body. And for what it's worth, there is the implication that Adam's soul was retrieved from Kaworu's body before it was placed back into the Adam embryo in EoE... Unless Adam's soul somehow returned to the Adam embryo upon Kaworu's death? I'm not sure if any of this is just Fanwank or exactly factual, so hell if I know to be perfectly honest. Just a thought I'm putting out there.
